# insertColumn

Inserts a column before the specified index.

Supported on:

*   [TableNode](/docs/plugins/api/TableNode/)

## Signature​

### insertColumn(columnIndex: number): void

## Parameters​

### columnIndex​

Index of the new column. Must satisfy `0 <= columnIndex <= numColumns`.
